{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-33214", "cvss": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Impact
The translation memory API exposed unintended endpoints, which in turn didn't do proper access control.

### Patches
* https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/pull/18513

### Workarounds
Blocking access to `/api/memory/` in the HTTP server removes access to this feature.

### References
This issue was reported by [ggamno](https://hackerone.com/ggamno) via HackerOne.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00236, "percentile": 0.14502}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mpf5-3vph-q75r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-16T20:41:19Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mpf5-3vph-q75r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mpf5-3vph-q75r"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33214"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-15T18:17:20Z", "published_at": "2026-04-16T20:41:19Z", "references": ["https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/security/advisories/GHSA-mpf5-3vph-q75r", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33214", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/pull/18513", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/weblate/PYSEC-2026-152.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mpf5-3vph-q75r"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/WeblateOrg/weblate/security-advisories/GHSA-mpf5-3vph-q75r", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate", "summary": "Weblate: Improper access control for the translation memory in API", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T19:53:54Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mpf5-3vph-q75r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.17", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "weblate"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 5.17"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Weblate: Improper access control for the translation memory in API
